hero.headline: IMPLEMENTATION SPECIALIST WITH UX AND SYSTEMS DEPTH
hero.description: I help make products and workflows easier to understand and easier to use. My background across SaaS delivery, UX, frontend implementation, and teaching means I am comfortable improving onboarding, shaping better journeys, and helping people use platforms with confidence.
hero.framing: I have worked on onboarding, workflow design, validation-heavy products, and day-to-day SaaS delivery. I bring user focus, structured communication, and practical technical understanding.

cards.title: SaaS Implementation Thinking
cards.body: Onboarding, workflows, product structure, and delivery

cards.title: UX-Led Enablement
cards.body: Discovery, better journeys, usability, and adoption

cards.title: Technical Delivery Context
cards.body: Product, frontend, data, and delivery awareness

implementation.label: IMPLEMENTATION
implementation.title: WHAT I BRING TO IMPLEMENTATION.
implementation.intro: I work well in roles where users, workflows, and delivery need aligning. I am comfortable spotting friction, shaping better journeys, and helping products feel easier to use in practice.

items.title: Clear onboarding thinking
items.description: I focus on the early points where users hit friction, shaping journeys that are easier to follow and complete.

items.title: Workflow design
items.description: I improve day-to-day tasks so products feel more structured, reliable, and usable.

items.title: Stakeholder communication
items.description: I explain product decisions clearly and keep delivery grounded in what users actually need.

items.title: Technical understanding
items.description: I work comfortably with product and engineering, with enough technical context to help shape practical solutions.

workIntro: Examples of onboarding, workflow improvement, operational UX, and product delivery across SaaS products.
demosIntro: A smaller set of commercial and conversion-focused builds retained to show execution range, separate from the core SaaS case studies.
writingIntro: I write occasionally about digital products, UX, delivery, and making systems easier to use.

linkedin.label: LINKEDIN
linkedin.title: FIND ME ON LINKEDIN.
linkedin.description: For roles, referrals, and the more formal version of my background.
linkedin.focusBody: Implementation, onboarding, workflow design, UX, and product thinking
linkedin.bestForBody: Implementation roles, referrals, and product or onboarding conversations

idealRoles.label: ROLES
idealRoles.title: WHERE I FIT BEST.
idealRoles.description: I am looking for implementation-focused work where onboarding, workflows, and product delivery all matter.

themes.title: Onboarding and implementation
themes.body: Work that helps users get set up well, understand the product quickly, and start using it with confidence.

themes.title: Workflow improvement
themes.body: Roles focused on making day-to-day tasks clearer, smoother, and more reliable in practice.

themes.title: Product enablement
themes.body: Teams that value structured delivery, practical UX thinking, and close collaboration across product and engineering.

idealRoles.supportingText: The fit is strongest in SaaS teams where the work sits close to users, delivery, and real product behaviour.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: LET’S TALK.
description: Open to implementation, onboarding, and product enablement roles where workflow improvement and thoughtful delivery matter.
Especially interested in SaaS teams where I can help make systems easier to adopt and easier to use.
contact.helperText: Tell me a little about the role, team, or problem space.
